description_long: This is a modern tablet computer with a detachable keyboard and an integrated kickstand, designed for productivity and portability. The device features a large, rectangular touchscreen display with a thin, dark bezel and a front-facing camera centered above the screen. The keyboard is slim, flat, and attaches magnetically to the bottom edge of the tablet, with a large touchpad and chiclet-style keys. The back of the tablet is smooth and matte, with a built-in kickstand that allows the device to stand upright at an angle. Ports and buttons are subtly integrated along the edges, maintaining a minimalist aesthetic. The overall color scheme is a uniform gray, giving the device a sleek and professional appearance.
description: A sleek gray tablet with a detachable keyboard, large touchscreen, and integrated kickstand for upright use. Features a minimalist design with a thin bezel and centered front camera.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large touchscreen, thin bezel, keyboard, and centered front-facing camera.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the slim profile, attached keyboard, and extended kickstand supporting the device.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the matte back surface, integrated kickstand, and rear camera at the top center.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the keyboard, kickstand, and device thickness.
attribute_screen_presence: Yes, a large rectangular screen occupies most of the front surface, centered with thin bezels on all sides.
attribute_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, symmetrical, and dark gray, with slightly rounded corners and a uniform width around the screen.
attribute_button_placement: No visible buttons on the front or sides in the provided views.
attribute_camera_location: A small camera is centered above the screen on the front bezel; a rear camera is centered at the top of the back.
